/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/debug_test.dir/examples/debug_test.cpp.o -o debug_test   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64 libcudaml.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
